name: enterprise / Car rental workflow 3
task: Sign Allan Smith for email offers with the email allan.smith@gmail.com and zip code 10001
goal_pattern: Sign up for email offers with user details: {first_name}, {last_name}, {email}, {zip_code}

applicability.when_to_use: When the user wants to subscribe to email promotions or newsletters.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When the user wants to book a car, manage a reservation, or perform any action other than signing up for email offers.

steps.step_intent: Navigate to the email offers sign-up page.
steps.selection_rule: Choose the link associated with the text 'Email Offers'.
steps.success_signal: A form for email sign-up with fields like 'First Name' and 'Last Name' becomes visible.

steps.value_policy: Use the first name from the user details provided in the task goal.
steps.selection_rule: Select the text input field with an attribute like 'first-name'.
steps.success_signal: The first name is correctly entered into the input field.
